content.description: The fundamental unit. Everything is an atom or derives from atom.
Executable code. Items with this in their type chain are code items.
Code that renders an item type
Type for the system viewport. The viewport manages view state and wraps rendered content with UI chrome.
System viewport. Manages view state for the current root item.
Code that provides editing UI for an item type. Can be declarative (ui_hints) or imperative (code).
A browser for navigating and filtering items by tags
Cascading Style Sheets - defines visual styling that can be loaded by renderers
Lists all type definitions in the system
Duplicates the current item with a new ID
A reusable REPL script that can be saved and executed
A container that holds and displays other items

content.title: Item Browser
content.description: Note-taking workspace with tag browser and search
A search interface for finding items by text content
A note with markdown-formatted body that can link to other items
Shared library for building hierarchical tag trees from flat tag lists

content.title: My First Note
content.description:
# Welcome to Markdown Notes!!

This is a note with **markdown** support.

## Features

- Write in markdown
- Link to other items using `item://` protocol
- Click Edit to modify

## Try It

Create another note and link to it like this:

`
[Link text](item://paste-item-id-here)
`

To get an item's ID, navigate to it and click "Copy ID" in the nav bar.

[Hobson](item://c3f4c6ad-e827-4999-bf22-724873a5aade)
Declarative editor defined via ui_hints. Rendered by generic_editor_renderer.
Library for loading CSS items into the document head

content.title: Hobson
content.description:
**Hobson** (this app) is a browser-based, always-on runtime environment that embodies radical structural uniformity: all entities (notes, code modules, type definitions, renderers, relationships) are "items" with identical structure, distinguished only by their type hierarchy rooted in a self-referential [atom](item://00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000). The system bootstraps from minimal seed items into a fully self-extensible environment where modifications to code items immediately affect running behavior without restart, and where the boundary between "using" and "programming" the system dissolves—code is written in items, executed by the kernel's module loader, and can query, create, and render other items through a composable renderer architecture. Storage (IndexedDB) and execution (ES modules) are entirely local, enabling complete offline functionality while maintaining the immediacy and inspectability of Smalltalk-like image-based systems, but built with standard web technologies for true cross-platform deployment.

[yada](item://2ae844a0-e2db-4322-ab59-7f33facf7ac3)
A classification tag for organizing items
Standard context menu styling for viewport and other UI components
Shared UI components for tag picker and tag browser
